---
title: "lungquery_featureplots"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-15"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
```

```{r}
lungQuery <-readRDS("C:/Users/Sshaikh9/Downloads/lungQuery_After_Az_Normalized.rds")
```
```{r diagnostics}
# Check working directory
message("Working directory: ", getwd())

# Check if lungQuery exists
message("lungQuery exists: ", exists("lungQuery"))

# If it exists, check it is a Seurat object
if (exists("lungQuery")) {
  message("Class: ", class(lungQuery))
  message("Cells: ", ncol(lungQuery))
} else {
  message("lungQuery NOT FOUND — check your loading chunk")
}
```


```{r}
features_all <- c("TGFBR2", 
"IGF1R",
"EGFR",
"PDGFRA",
"IL6ST",
"IGFBP5",
"CDKN1B",
"MYCBP2",
"BMPR2",
"JAK1",
"ZEB2",
"ZEB1",
"KMT2A",
"DNMT3A",
"DNMT1",
"FOXO1",
"RUNX1",
"CDKN1A",
"MALAT1",
"NEAT1")
```

features_all <- c("AOPEP","CD44","SPRR1A","KRT78","CST1","HOXC11")
custom <- subset(lungQuery, subset = Donor_Group %in% groups)

lungQuery <- 

```{r}
getwd()
```


feat <- 'NEAT1'
```{r featureplots-earlysaccular-alveolar-ptbpd, echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

dir.create("Plots6", showWarnings = FALSE)

features_all <- c("IGF1R", "BMPR2", "ZEB1", "ZEB2")

groups_keep <- c("PT_NEWBORN", "FT_NEWBORN", "PT_BPD")

lung_subset <- subset(
  lungQuery,
  subset = Donor_Group %in% groups_keep
)

lung_subset$Donor_Group <- factor(
  lung_subset$Donor_Group,
  levels = c("PT_NEWBORN", "FT_NEWBORN", "PT_BPD"),
  labels = c("EarlySaccular", "Alveolar", "PT_BPD")
)

for (feat in features_all) {

  p <- FeaturePlot(
    object = lung_subset,
    features = feat,
    split.by = "Donor_Group",
    raster = FALSE,
    cols = c("#89cff0", "grey", "red")
  ) +
    patchwork::plot_layout(ncol = 3, nrow = 1) &
    ggplot2::theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")
    )

  print(p)

  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(
      "Plots6/FeaturePlot_",
      feat,
      "_EarlySaccular_Alveolar_PTBPD.png"
    ),
    plot = p,
    width = 12,
    height = 4,
    dpi = 300
  )
}
```
